name: 01_long-multiparagraph
description: Long multi-paragraph plain-text draft (~500 chars) covering the realistic 'three-priorities email body' shape — exercises paragraph joining, no chips, no NBSP. Synthesized; no PII.
input:
Quarterly review prep. We are doubling down on three priorities this quarter and dropping two from last quarter that did not earn their keep.

First priority: ship the cross-platform desktop client. Engineering says feature parity is two sprints out, design is in final-pixel mode, and QA has a regression suite ready. Confirm the launch window before next Tuesday.

Second: rework onboarding. New users hit the empty state too fast and bounce.

Third: refresh sales enablement. The deck is dated and our champions deserve better artillery.
expectedSanitised:
Quarterly review prep. We are doubling down on three priorities this quarter and dropping two from last quarter that did not earn their keep.

First priority: ship the cross-platform desktop client. Engineering says feature parity is two sprints out, design is in final-pixel mode, and QA has a regression suite ready. Confirm the launch window before next Tuesday.

Second: rework onboarding. New users hit the empty state too fast and bounce.

Third: refresh sales enablement. The deck is dated and our champions deserve better artillery.
